event: View of a chapel with outdoor crucifix
symbols: outdoor crucifix — the cross planted in the landscape, marking the land as sacred and claimed for Christ
small stone chapel — the humble house of God in the countryside, the faith of the rural community
description: A small oil painting depicting a rustic stone chapel with a slate roof set on a grassy hillside. To the left of the chapel stands a tall dark crucifix (calvary cross) silhouetted against a vivid blue sky. The chapel has arched doorways and windows, and its stonework is rendered in warm browns and grays. Rocky coastal terrain and the sea are visible to the right. The brushwork is textured with visible impasto. A signature and date appear in the lower left corner.
